summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yashoda Total Solution website features including About page team section, Gallery page with filters and lightbox, multilingual support, backend APIs, and form submissions.
seed_data_creation: Created test review and contact entries via API and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Backend APIs (POST /api/reviews, POST /api/contacts) are saving data to MongoDB. About page displays 3 team profile images (MD, Sales, Legal) with correct alt text and multilingual translations. Gallery page has hero section, 5 filter buttons (All, Team, Office, Our Work, Success Stories), 7 images, working filters, and lightbox functionality. Language switching works across all pages (English, Hindi, Marathi). Navigation bar includes Gallery link and navigates correctly. No console errors detected.

about_page.team_section_images: PASSED - 3 profile images visible with correct alt text (MD: Rajesh Verma, Sales Team, Legal Team)
about_page.multilingual_support: PASSED - All text including titles, descriptions, team titles change correctly in English/Hindi/Marathi

gallery_page.filter_buttons: PASSED - All 5 buttons (All, Team, Office, Our Work, Success Stories)
gallery_page.filter_functionality: PASSED - Filters correctly (Team:3, Office:1, Work:2, Success:1, All:7)
gallery_page.lightbox: PASSED - Opens on click, closes with X button and clicking outside
gallery_page.multilingual_support: PASSED - Title and filter labels change correctly

backend_apis.POST /api/reviews: PASSED - Creates review with correct data structure, validation working
backend_apis.POST /api/contacts: PASSED - Creates contact with correct data structure

forms.review_form: PASSED - Form validation, submission, success message
forms.contact_form: PASSED - Form validation, submission, success message
